Gaunts: Luck
瘦骨怪: 幸運

Gaunts: Silver for the poor, Gold for the poor.
瘦骨怪: 「銀幣給窮人，金幣給窮人。」

Gaunts: Night
瘦骨怪: 夜晚

Gaunts: About time I got back to work.  Alms for the poor.  Alms!
瘦骨怪: 「該回去工作了。施捨給窮人。施捨!」

Gaunts: South
瘦骨怪: 南方

Gaunts: Spell
瘦骨怪: 法術

Gaunts: Thieves
瘦骨怪: 盜賊

Gaunts: Traders
瘦骨怪: 商人

Gaunts: The back wall is one of the best examples of a perpendicular wall that you have ever seen.  It reminds you of the time when you thought about climbing Mount Everest.
瘦骨怪: 這面後牆是你見過垂直牆壁的最佳典範。它讓你想起了曾考慮攀登聖母峰的時光。

Gaunts: An early model of a hot dog stand -- or could it be a hamburger stand?
瘦骨怪: 一個早期型號的熱狗攤——或者它是漢堡攤?

Gaunts: You can't make them out from here.
瘦骨怪: 你從這裡看不清楚他們。

Gaunts: Some sharp, pointy object appears to have been thrown at these walls several times.
瘦骨怪: 看起來有些尖銳的物體被多次投擲到這些牆上。

Gaunts: You'll need more practice before you'll be able to climb this wall.
瘦骨怪: 你需要更多練習才能攀爬這面牆。

Gaunts: This grubby place must be an alley.  It feels strange here, colder than the rest of town.  There are some barrels discarded here.  A Beggar holds out a bowl towards you.
瘦骨怪: 這個骯髒的地方一定是條小巷。這裡感覺很奇怪，比城鎮其他地方更冷。這裡有些丟棄的桶子。一個乞丐朝你伸出一個碗。

Gaunts: Nice place.  How does this guy expect to make a living begging in this alley?
瘦骨怪: 好地方。這傢伙怎麼指望在這條小巷裡靠乞討維生呢?

Gaunts: The walls seem pretty normal, but there are some curious marks on the north ends of the buildings.
瘦骨怪: 牆壁看起來很正常，但建築物的北端有些奇怪的痕跡。

Gaunts: The barrels are empty.  One smells of sour beer.  Another barrel reeks of Troll's Sweat.
瘦骨怪: 桶子是空的。一個聞起來像酸啤酒。另一個桶子散發著巨魔之汗的臭味。

Gaunts: Looks like this barrel once contained Dragon's Breath.  The bottom's eaten out.
瘦骨怪: 看起來這個桶子曾經盛過龍息。底部已經被腐蝕穿了。

Gaunts: That's a pretty tall wall.
瘦骨怪: 這是一堵相當高的牆。

Gaunts: That wall sure is tall.  You'll need to practice some more before you'll be ready to climb it.
瘦骨怪: 那堵牆確實很高。你需要再練習一下才能準備好攀爬它。

Gaunts: You just see a glint from here.
瘦骨怪: 你從這裡只能看到一道閃光。

Gaunts: It's a glowing golden coin.
瘦骨怪: 這是一枚發光的金幣。

Gaunts: Some sharp object appears to have been thrown at these walls several times.
瘦骨怪: 看起來有些尖銳的物體被多次投擲到這些牆上。

Gaunts: This place seems sinister at night.  Some strange object is glowing at the other end of the alley.
瘦骨怪: 這個地方在夜間顯得陰森。在小巷的另一端有些奇怪的物體在發光。

Gaunts: You mean that the first victim we've had in months is a thief?  Here I thought we were finally going to make some money.
瘦骨怪: 「你是說我們好幾個月來遇到的第一個受害者是小偷?我以為我們終於要賺錢了。」

Gaunts: Tell Crusher that the password is 'schwertfisch'.  He's in the tavern.
瘦骨怪: 「告訴克拉舍密碼是『schwertfisch』。他在酒館裡。」

Gaunts: Now go before I forget you made the sign and I make you pay anyway.
瘦骨怪: 「現在滾蛋，趁我還沒忘記你做出那個手勢，不然我讓你付出代價。」

Gaunts: You had better check in at the Thieves' Guild before you get in trouble for practicing without a license.  Find Crusher in the tavern and give him the password.
瘦骨怪: 「你最好先到盜賊公會報到，免得因為沒執照就練習而惹上麻煩。在酒館裡找克拉舍，給他密碼。」

Gaunts: What's that supposed to be?  You trying to pretend you're a thief or something?  Har, har.
瘦骨怪: 「那是什麼東西?你在假裝你是小偷什麼的?哈，哈。」

Gaunts: The thieves seem to be ignoring you.
瘦骨怪: 盜賊們似乎在忽視你。

Gaunts: The whole place is in need of repair.
瘦骨怪: 整個地方都需要修繕。

Gaunts: Yeah, yeah, we know, you're in the Guild too.  How's a poor independent businessman supposed to make a living around here with all this competition?
瘦骨怪: 「是是是，我們知道你也在公會裡。一個可憐的獨立商人怎麼樣才能在這裡的這麼多競爭中謀生呢?」

Gaunts: The dagger looks sharp and very deadly.
瘦骨怪: 匕首看起來很鋒利，非常致命。

Gaunts: This man may be smiling at you, but he doesn't seem very friendly.  His florid face tells you that this thief is a regular at the "Aces and Eights" tavern.
瘦骨怪: 這個男人可能在向你微笑，但他看起來不太友好。他紅潤的臉龐告訴你這個盜賊是「Aces and Eights」酒館的常客。

Gaunts: This man may be smiling at you, but he doesn't seem very friendly.  He may be short, but that dagger makes him look 7 feet tall.
瘦骨怪: 這個男人可能在向你微笑，但他看起來不太友好。他可能很矮，但那把匕首讓他看起來有7英尺高。

Gaunts: See that dagger?  The next one is centered on your back.
瘦骨怪: 「看到那把匕首了嗎?下一把就對準你的背了。」

Gaunts: Give Sneak there your cash and you walk out of here.  It's a simple trade, your life for your money.
瘦骨怪: 「把你的錢給斯尼克，然後你可以走出這裡。這很簡單，用你的生命換你的錢。」

Gaunts: That 'Coin Light' spell gets them every time.  See that dagger?  The next one is centered on your back.
瘦骨怪: 「那個『Coin Light』法術每次都能騙到他們。看到那把匕首了嗎?下一把就對準你的背了。」

Gaunts: Give Sneak there your cash and you walk out of here. It's a simple trade, your life for your money.
瘦骨怪: 「把你的錢給斯尼克，然後你可以走出這裡。這很簡單，用你的生命換你的錢。」

Gaunts: Aw, ya forgot to pay.  What a shame.
瘦骨怪: 「啊，你忘記付錢了。太可惜了。」

Gaunts: Hey, Sneak, this guy's hard of hearing or something.  I told him to stay out of our alley, and he didn't listen.  Let's teach him a little lesson about listening to his betters.
瘦骨怪: 「嘿，斯尼克，這傢伙好像是個聾子還是什麼。我告訴他別進我們的小巷，他沒聽。讓我們教他一堂關於聽從比他高明的人的課。」

Gaunts: As Slink reaches for his dagger, you draw your Thieves' Guild license...  You win by a close margin.
瘦骨怪: 當斯林克伸手去拔匕首時，你拿出你的盜賊公會執照...你差點就贏了。

Gaunts: All right, so you got your license.  How nice.  Guess we don't get to kill you right now.  But stay out of our alley, 'cause we got real short memories, like.
瘦骨怪: 「好吧，所以你有執照。很好。看來我們現在沒法殺你。但別進我們的小巷，因為我們的記性特別差，懂吧。」

Gaunts: As Slink reaches for his dagger, you draw your Thieves' Guild license...  You *almost* make it.
瘦骨怪: 當斯林克伸手去拔匕首時，你拿出你的盜賊公會執照...你*幾乎*成功了。

Gaunts: Hey, Sneak, this guy's hard of hearing or something.  I told him to get a license last time he was here, and he didn't listen.
瘦骨怪: 「嘿，斯尼克，這傢伙好像是個聾子還是什麼。我上次告訴他要去辦執照，他沒聽。」

Gaunts: Let's teach him a little lesson about listening to his betters.
瘦骨怪: 「讓我們教他一堂關於聽從比他高明的人的課。」

Gaunts: Why, how nice to see you again.  I do hope (for your sake) you brought us some nice shiny new silver.
瘦骨怪: 「哦，很高興再次見到你。我希望(為了你好)你帶來了一些漂亮的新銀幣。」

Gaunts: As you start to draw your weapon, the thieves jump you.
瘦骨怪: 當你開始拔武器時，盜賊們撲向你。

Gaunts: That's all right.  We already have all your money, but it was certainly nice of you to offer.
瘦骨怪: 「沒關係。我們已經拿了你全部的錢，但你的好意還是很好。」

Gaunts: Thanks, and have a nice evening.  It's been a pleasure doing business with you.  You can find your way out, I'm sure.  But make it fast, before my dagger slips.
瘦骨怪: 「感謝，祝你晚上愉快。與你做生意很愉快。我相信你能找到出口。但快點，免得我的匕首滑出去。」

Gaunts: Hey!  You don't have enough money to be worth our while.  How do you expect us poor independent businessmen to make a living?
瘦骨怪: 「嘿!你的錢不夠我們費心。你怎麼指望我們這些可憐的獨立商人謀生呢?」

Gaunts: My finger is getting itchy, so just pay up and get out alive.
瘦骨怪: 「我的手指在發癢，所以乖乖付錢，活著滾出去。」

Gaunts: My finger is starting to get a bit twitchy, so forget about questions, just pay the man and get out alive.
瘦骨怪: 「我的手指開始有點抽搐，所以別問問題，乖乖付錢給這傢伙，活著滾出去。」

Gaunts: Affects where knife goes.
瘦骨怪: 「影響刀的方向。」

Gaunts: Place hand on red dot.
瘦骨怪: 「把手放在紅點上。」

Gaunts: Hey, nice game.  It's a tie.
瘦骨怪: 「嘿，好遊戲。平手。」

Gaunts: You got me that time.  Say, you're pretty tough!
瘦骨怪: 「你這次贏了我。說，你很強啊!」

Gaunts: So, you think you're pretty hot stuff, eh?  Well, we'll see about that.
瘦骨怪: 「所以，你認為你很了不起，嗯?好吧，我們就看看吧。」

Gaunts: If you don't bet, you can't play.
瘦骨怪: 「如果你不下注，就不能玩。」

Gaunts: It's a tie.  Let's double the wager.
瘦骨怪: 「平手。我們加倍賭注吧。」

Gaunts: Looks like I won that one.  Must have gotten lucky.
瘦骨怪: 「看起來我贏了那一局。肯定是運氣好。」

Gaunts: Hey!  This is cash on the table.  You can't bet what you don't have.
瘦骨怪: 「嘿!這是現金。你不能賭你沒有的東西。」

Gaunts: Now, let's not get carried away.
瘦骨怪: 「現在，別太過分了。」

Gaunts: Affects how far knife flies.
瘦骨怪: 「影響刀飛多遠。」

Gaunts: Place hand on slider.
瘦骨怪: 「把手放在滑塊上。」

Gaunts: It's your hand.
瘦骨怪: 「這是你的手。」

Gaunts: Shall we play again?
瘦骨怪: 「我們再玩一次嗎?」

Gaunts: That's the "Dag-Nab-It" board.
瘦骨怪: 那是「Dag-Nab-It」棋盤。

Gaunts: The game is called Dag-Nab-It.  You take turns with the Chief Thief throwing daggers at the board.  Each player gets three turns, and throws three daggers in each turn.
瘦骨怪: 遊戲叫「Dag-Nab-It」。你和盜賊首領輪流向棋盤投擲匕首。每個玩家有三輪，每輪投擲三把匕首。

Gaunts: More points are scored the closer each dagger hits to the center of the board.  Highest score wins the bet.
瘦骨怪: 匕首越接近棋盤中心，得分就越高。最高分贏得賭注。

Gaunts: Adjust force and angle of throw with the arrow keys or mouse, according to your hand position.  Press Enter or click on the small dag-nab-it board to throw.
瘦骨怪: 根據你的手部位置，用方向鍵或滑鼠調整投擲的力度和角度。按 Enter 或點擊小的 dag-nab-it 棋盤來投擲。

Gaunts: Quest for Glory I was designed and directed by Lori Ann Cole and Corey Cole. If you liked this game, then you'll love the other fine Sierra games they have designed: "Quest for Glory 2:  Trial By Fire", "The Castle of Dr. Brain", and, for the younger crowd, "Mixed Up Fairy Tales".
瘦骨怪: 《英雄傳奇 I》由 Lori Ann Cole 和 Corey Cole 設計和導演。如果你喜歡這個遊戲，你也會喜歡他們設計的其他優秀 Sierra 遊戲:《英雄傳奇 2:火焰審判》、《顱骨博士的城堡》和針對年輕人的《混亂的童話故事》。

Gaunts: And look for "Quest for Glory 3:  The Wages of War" in your local stores starting in Autumn, 1992.
瘦骨怪: 並在 1992 年秋季開始在你當地商店尋找《英雄傳奇 3:戰爭的代價》。

Gaunts: The incredible artwork was tastefully rendered by:  Jon Bock, Gerald Moore, Arturo Sinclair, Jeff Crowe, Gloria Garland, Willis Wong, Diana Wilson, Eric Kasner, Richard Powell, and Roger Hardy.
瘦骨怪: 令人難以置信的藝術作品由以下人員精心繪製:Jon Bock、Gerald Moore、Arturo Sinclair、Jeff Crowe、Gloria Garland、Willis Wong、Diana Wilson、Eric Kasner、Richard Powell 和 Roger Hardy。

Gaunts: Original Music by:  Mark Seibert, Aubrey Hodges, and Spike Jones.
瘦骨怪: 原始音樂由 Mark Seibert、Aubrey Hodges 和 Spike Jones 創作。

Gaunts: The nastiest monsters in the game were, as always, the bugs.  Our heroic gang of bugbusters deserve thanks:  Joe Carper, Dave Clingman, Mike Pickhinke, and a cast of dozens.
瘦骨怪: 遊戲中最討厭的怪物，一如既往，是程式錯誤。我們英勇的除蟲隊值得感謝:Joe Carper、Dave Clingman、Mike Pickhinke 和許多其他人。

Gaunts: The Peaks of Programming Perfection were scaled by:  Tom DeSalvo, Vana Baker, Richard Aronson, Carlos Escobar, Robert Mallory, Oliver Brelsford, Brett Miller, Gary Kamigawachi, Sean Mooney, and Bob Fischbach.
瘦骨怪: 編程完美的高峰由以下人員攀登:Tom DeSalvo、Vana Baker、Richard Aronson、Carlos Escobar、Robert Mallory、Oliver Brelsford、Brett Miller、Gary Kamigawachi、Sean Mooney 和 Bob Fischbach。

Gaunts: Don't ask why, if those peaks were perfect, we needed so many people to find bugs.
瘦骨怪: 別問為什麼，如果那些高峰是完美的，我們為什麼需要這麼多人來找程式錯誤。

Gaunts: Version %s  Copyright 1989, 1990, 1992  Sierra On-Line, Inc.
瘦骨怪: 版本 %s  版權 1989、1990、1992  Sierra On-Line, Inc.

Gaunts: You're about as stealthy as the average Goon.
瘦骨怪: 你的潛行能力就像普通的小流氓一樣。

Gaunts: Sorry, there's not enough room to see that here.
瘦骨怪: 抱歉，這裡沒有足夠的空間看到那個。

Gaunts: To learn about the other icons, first click here, then pass the question mark over the other icons.
瘦骨怪: 要瞭解其他圖標，請先點擊這裡，然後將問號滑過其他圖標。

Gaunts: Select this icon if you decide not to decide to select an icon.
瘦骨怪: 如果你決定不選擇圖標，請選擇此圖標。

Gaunts: Select this icon to catch a little R&R.
瘦骨怪: 選擇此圖標來獲得一些休息。

Gaunts: Select this icon to run away.
瘦骨怪: 選擇此圖標來逃跑。

Gaunts: Select this icon to take a look at your current character's statistics.
瘦骨怪: 選擇此圖標來查看你當前角色的統計信息。

Gaunts: Select this icon to stealthily go where no one has lurked before.
瘦骨怪: 選擇此圖標來潛行到沒人來過的地方。

Gaunts: Say, kids!  What time is it?
瘦骨怪: 喂，孩子們!現在是幾點?

Gaunts: Select this icon to resume walking normally.
瘦骨怪: 選擇此圖標來恢復正常走路。

Gaunts: Suddenly a feeling of peace and tranquility permeates the area.
瘦骨怪: 突然間，一種和平和寧靜的感覺充滿了整個區域。

Gaunts: Calm Spell
瘦骨怪: 鎮定術

Gaunts: You don't have any daggers.
瘦骨怪: 你沒有任何匕首。

Gaunts: Ouch!  You threw your dagger...  Now you're stuck with it!
瘦骨怪: 哎喲!你丟出了你的匕首...現在你被卡住了!

Gaunts: Flame Dart Spell
瘦骨怪: 火焰鏢

Gaunts: Dazzle Spell
瘦骨怪: 眩目術

Gaunts: Detect Spell
瘦骨怪: 偵測魔法

Gaunts: Fetch Spell
瘦骨怪: 取物術

Gaunts: To find out more about a spell, first click here, then click on the spell.
瘦骨怪: 要瞭解更多關於法術的信息，請先點擊這裡，然後點擊法術。

Gaunts: The spell has no effect.
瘦骨怪: 法術沒有效果。

Gaunts: Open Spell
瘦骨怪: 開啟術

Gaunts: You don't have any rocks.
瘦骨怪: 你沒有任何石頭。

Gaunts: Ouch!  You always hurt the one you love!
瘦骨怪: 哎喲!你總是傷害你愛的人!

Gaunts: To cast a spell, first click here, then click on the spell.
瘦骨怪: 要施展法術，請先點擊這裡，然後點擊法術。

Gaunts: That spell is not useful here.
瘦骨怪: 那個法術在這裡沒有用。

Gaunts: You possess the %s. Your expertise is %d. You will use %d Magic Points each time you cast this spell.
瘦骨怪: 你擁有 %s。你的專業知識是 %d。每次施展這個法術時，你將使用 %d 法力點數。

Gaunts: Trigger Spell
瘦骨怪: 觸發術

Gaunts: Zap Spell
瘦骨怪: 電擊術

Gaunts: Arturo  Sinclair
瘦骨怪: Arturo Sinclair

Gaunts: The Baron.
瘦骨怪: 男爵。

Gaunts: The bartender.
瘦骨怪: 酒保。

Gaunts: The Baronet Barnard von Spielburg.
瘦骨怪: 準男爵巴納德·馮·史畢柏格。

Gaunts: Bob  Fischbach
瘦骨怪: Bob Fischbach

Gaunts: Bob  Mallory
瘦骨怪: Bob Mallory

Gaunts: Carlos  Escobar
瘦骨怪: Carlos Escobar

Gaunts: Shema, Shameen, and Abdulla Doo.
瘦骨怪: 席瑪、沙敏和阿布杜拉·嘟。

Gaunts: The Centaurs.
瘦骨怪: 半人馬。

Gaunts: Corey  Cole
瘦骨怪: Corey Cole

Gaunts: The Chief Thief and Crusher.
瘦骨怪: 盜賊首領和克拉舍。

Gaunts: Diana  Wilson
瘦骨怪: Diana Wilson

Gaunts: Elsa von Spielburg.
瘦骨怪: 艾爾莎·馮·史畢柏格。

Gaunts: Eric  Kasner
瘦骨怪: Eric Kasner

Gaunts: Erasmus and Fenrus.
瘦骨怪: 伊拉斯謨和芬魯斯。

Gaunts: Gloria  Garland
瘦骨怪: Gloria Garland

Gaunts: The guildmaster.
瘦骨怪: 公會大師。

Gaunts: The hermit and the healer.
瘦骨怪: 隱士和治療師。

Gaunts: You're the real Hero of this game!  Congratulations!
瘦骨怪: 你是這個遊戲的真正英雄!恭喜!

Gaunts: Jeff  Crowe
瘦骨怪: Jeff Crowe

Gaunts: Jerry  Moore
瘦骨怪: Jerry Moore

Gaunts: Jon  Bock
瘦骨怪: Jon Bock
